scenes.sentence: Little Lily was a good girl, but one day she made a mess.
Her mom asked, "Lily, did you make this mess?" Lily felt scared.
She did not want to get in trouble, so she said, "No, I did not make the mess." But Lily's mom could see the paint on Lily's hands.
"Lily, you must tell the truth," said her mom.
Lily felt sad and said, "I'm sorry, I made the mess." Her mom gave her a big hug.
